description:
Perform an outlier analysis using linear regression on the 'Exam Anxiety' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety.csv). Using 'Exam' as the dependent variable and 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' as covariates, identify the student with the largest positive residual. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Exam_Outlier_Analysis.omv and record the outlier's details in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/outlier_student.txt using the following format:
Student_Code: <Code>
Actual_Exam: <value>
Predicted_Exam: <value>
Residual: <value>
